tasks.label: Pantheon: Run CrowPilot Developer (8787)
args: source .venv/bin/activate && PANTHEON_EDITION=crowpilot-developer PANTHEON_RUNTIME_PROFILE=developer PANTHEON_EMBED_MODE=realtime PANTHEON_PORT=8787 uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8787 --reload --timeout-graceful-shutdown 1 --reload-delay 2

tasks.label: Pantheon: Run CrowPilot (8788)
args: source .venv/bin/activate && PANTHEON_EDITION=crowpilot PANTHEON_RUNTIME_PROFILE=workstation PANTHEON_EMBED_MODE=realtime PANTHEON_EMBEDDING_MODEL=Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B-Q8_0.gguf PANTHEON_PORT=8788 uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8788 --reload --timeout-graceful-shutdown 1 --reload-delay 2

tasks.label: Pantheon: Run CrowPilot Lite (8789)
args: source .venv/bin/activate && PANTHEON_EDITION=crowpilot-lite PANTHEON_RUNTIME_PROFILE=lite PANTHEON_EMBED_MODE=realtime PANTHEON_EMBEDDING_MODEL=nomic-embed-text-v1.5.Q8_0.gguf PANTHEON_PORT=8789 uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8789 --reload --timeout-graceful-shutdown 1 --reload-delay 2

tasks.label: Pantheon: Run CrowPi (8790)
args: source .venv/bin/activate && PANTHEON_EDITION=crowpi PANTHEON_RUNTIME_PROFILE=raspberry-pi PANTHEON_LOCAL_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8082/v1 PANTHEON_LOCAL_MODEL=Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct-Q4_K_M.gguf PANTHEON_SCAN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8083/v1 PANTHEON_SCAN_MODEL=Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct-Q4_K_M.gguf PANTHEON_SCAN_PROMPT_MODE=instruction PANTHEON_EMBEDDING_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8081/v1 PANTHEON_EMBED_MODE=overnight PANTHEON_EMBEDDING_MODEL=nomic-embed-text-v1.5.Q8_0.gguf PANTHEON_PORT=8790 uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8790 --reload --timeout-graceful-shutdown 1 --reload-delay 2
